title: botrychium dissectum f. oneidense
intro: Botrychium dissectum f. oneidense, also known as one-sided fern or one-sided lady fern, is a rare and unique species of flowering plant in the Ophioglossaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Botrychium dissectum f. oneidense include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and provide relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
